pattern: Enumerate every achievable total (each topping used 0, 1, or 2 times on top of each base) and keep the cost nearest the target, tie-breaking toward the lower cost.
hints: Every topping independently contributes 0, 1, or 2 of its price, so the reachable costs form a tree of choices over the toppings.
For each base flavor, explore all topping combinations and track the total closest to the target.
When two totals are equally far from the target, prefer the smaller total.

edge_inputs.description: base alone already overshoots, no toppings best

stress.description: up to 10 bases and 10 toppings with random prices
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    nb = rng.randrange(1, 11)
    nt = rng.randrange(1, 11)
    bases = [rng.randrange(1, 10001) for _ in range(nb)]
    tops = [rng.randrange(1, 10001) for _ in range(nt)]
    target = rng.randrange(1, 10001)
    return [bases, tops, target]
